rationale: The cited paper is used for more than background: the citing article directly relies on it when operationalizing key variables in the econometric model. Specifically, it follows Fok et al. (2006) to separate regular price from temporary promotion using asymmetric cubic spline smoothing and also cites it for competitive price-promotion control construction. It is also invoked in the conceptual argument that high price dispersion increases comparison difficulty. These roles indicate a meaningful methodological and framing contribution to the citing study.
relation_description: The citing paper applies methodological elements from Fok et al. (2006), especially the regular-price extraction and promotion-index construction approach, within its hierarchical Bayesian analysis of cause-related marketing sales effects. It also uses the cited study as support for price-dispersion-based market complexity arguments.
